name: Awning
description: Striped seaside awnings hanging in rows, every scallop dipping to its own depth — redraws recolor the canvas stripe by stripe.

code.style: --rule: ( z-index: calc(100 - @y); /* stripe and scallop share one emitted canvas color; rows stack so the scallop hangs over the row below */ --canvas: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @var(--canvas); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; width: 100%; top: 96%; height: @rand(22%, 38%); border-radius: 0 0 50% 50%; background: @var(--canvas); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
